title: Theirstack Actor
description: Scrape companies by technology from TheirStack. Filter by country, industry, or company size.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Select a technology or choose 'Other' to type your own.

customTechnology.title: Custom Technology
customTechnology.description: If you selected 'Other' above, type your technology name here (e.g. 'Postgres', 'Datadog', 'Figma').

country.title: Country Filter
country.description: Filter results by country. Select a preset or choose 'Other' to type your own.

customCountry.title: Custom Country
customCountry.description: If you selected 'Other' above, type your country name here (e.g. 'Sweden', 'Singapore').

industry.title: Industry Filter
industry.description: Filter results by industry. Select a preset or choose 'Other' to type your own.

customIndustry.title: Custom Industry
customIndustry.description: If you selected 'Other' above, type your industry here (e.g. 'Proptech', 'Legaltech').

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of companies to collect. Recommended: 25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000, 2500, 5000.

hunterApiKey.title: Hunter.io API Key (optional)
hunterApiKey.description: Provide your Hunter.io key to enrich results with verified email addresses and contact patterns.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify proxy settings. Residential proxy recommended for best reliability.
